text: Integrate external economic and operational signals instead of reimplementing their source systems
description: Let the loop consume selected signals from accounting, payments, analytics, funding, and other existing systems through modular connectors. Aimparency stores decisions and evidence references; source systems remain authoritative.

status.comment: Requires choosing the first authoritative source system and granting its connector/API access. No source should be invented or reimplemented.

reflection: Dependency contract is ready via waiting_for_external and correlated evidence. Actual integration correctly waits for a user-selected source and authorization.
